description: Index of Rival One implementation guides under skills/catalog/. Validated by scripts/validate_catalog.py.

bundles.title: JWT authentication (HS512)
bundles.summary: Build or load the Bearer token; same string authorizes over the socket (RequestType 45).

bundles.title: WebSocket connection and heartbeat
bundles.summary: Open WSS with Authorization header, send authorize, then ping on an interval.

bundles.title: Instrument search and market data
bundles.summary: Search (33), multiple subscriptions (0) on one WebSocket with orders; demux inbound, serialize sends.

bundles.title: Send and revise orders
bundles.summary: Send order (2) with float Quantity/Price; revise (4) without setting GroupName.

bundles.title: Common errors and checks
bundles.summary: Auth vs TLS, group/user mismatches, and where to read more.
